ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "written_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the review */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch representing the venue (e.g., Universal Studios Florida) */,
  "rating_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment associated with the rating (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "date_object" TEXT /* Date object for analytical purposes */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the review was written */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the review was written */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter when the review was written */,
  "review_og" TEXT /* Original review text for reference */,
  "review_length" INTEGER /* Length of the review in characters */,
  "wordcounts_title" INTEGER /* Word count of the review title */,
  "wordcounts_reviewtext" INTEGER /* Word count of the review text */,
  "tokens" TEXT /* List of tokens extracted from the review text */,
  "wordcounts_reviewtext_processed" INTEGER /* Processed word count of the review text */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review */,
  "textblob_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification based on TextBlob analysis */,
  "review_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the review was submitted (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., complaint, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue (e.g., Universal Studios Florida) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., theme park, theater) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the venue opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review */,
  "textblob_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification based on TextBlob analysis */,
  "nlp_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification based on NLP analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating across all reviews for the venue */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted for the venue */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the most recent review submitted */,
  "top_complaints" TEXT /* Top complaints extracted from reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_stats_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being acted upon */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., submitted, edited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of insights from the reviews */,
  "detailed_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis and findings from the reviews */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Actionable recommendations for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being tracked */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue feature */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue offering the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Wi-Fi, Parking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_features_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Concert, Show) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is scheduled */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, show) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
